title: Opening for Store Manager at HomeTown Global Group

jsonLd.title: Opening for Store Manager at HomeTown Global Group
jsonLd.description:
HomeTown Global Group is actively seeking a talented and motivated Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Ludhiana. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About HomeTown Global Group:
HomeTown Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HomeTown Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
